sections.title: When attempting to sell tradeable rewards back

lines.speaker: Justine
lines.text: Sorry, I don't offer refunds on items that people can trade with each other.

sections.title: When attempting to sell tradeable rewards back as an Ironman

lines.speaker: Justine
lines.text: Sorry, I don't offer refunds on items that people can trade with each other.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can't you make an exception for me? I'm an Ironman by the way.

lines.speaker: Justine
lines.text: My rule applies to the item regardless. Did you think I was going to cater differently to you?

lines.speaker: Justine
lines.text: Hey, I'm Justine. I've got some rewards here for fighters who've done well in Lisa's Last Man Standing game. Wanna see?

lines.speaker: Justine
lines.text: I'll pay you [X] points for one of those.

sections.title: When attempting to open the door near her

lines.speaker: Justine
lines.text: Hey, that door's for staff only!

sections.title: When not on an official LMS world
